summary: End-to-end backend + frontend testing for PrepOS foundation. 15/15 pytest backend cases passed (health, auth register/login/me/logout/refresh/forgot-password, onboarding CRUD, profile CRUD, settings CRUD). Frontend: register→onboarding→mission-control, all 7 dashboard widgets, all 9 sidebar routes, Cmd+K + global search command palette, AI Assistant docked panel, all 6 Settings tabs incl. AI config, Profile page, logout redirect, forgot-password success, admin login correctly redirected to /onboarding (onboarding_completed=false).
critical_code_review_comments: Onboarding date picker uses shadcn Popover + react-day-picker Calendar. It works interactively but has no data-testid on the individual day cells / month-nav buttons, which makes automated selection brittle. Consider adding data-testids like onboarding-calendar-next-month and onboarding-calendar-day to unblock reliable e2e tests.

routes_user.py exposes `/api/profile` and returns the user document with a str-typed created_at from Mongo. Response model UserPublic uses `extra=ignore`, which correctly silently drops password_hash if present — but get_current_user already strips it. Consider always calling _user_public helper for consistency instead of returning raw doc from GET /api/profile.
Cookies use SameSite=None+Secure=True (correct for HTTPS preview). Verified admin seeding is idempotent and re-hashes password if changed.
Sidebar has 9 links matching product spec; placeholder pages (Coding Arena, System Design, Knowledge Base, AI Mentor, Command Analytics) route correctly.
AI panel + Command Palette are UI-only and function correctly.
test_credentials: admin@prepos.io / Admin@123 (seeded). Test users created dynamically with TEST_ui_<hex>@prepos.io / Test@1234
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_user_* and TEST_ui_* users created via /api/auth/register. Onboarding + settings records created for each. Consider cleanup fixture in future iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py in /app/backend/tests uses pytest classes: TestHealth, TestAuth, TestOnboarding, TestProfile, TestSettings. Run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. Frontend calendar picker on onboarding step 6 works interactively but automated day-cell selection requires the following: click [data-testid=onboarding-target-date] to open Popover, then wait for [role=grid] then click a `button[name="day"]` or a rdp-day button. In tests I bypassed via POST /api/onboarding directly. Adding testids to calendar days would help.
rca of the issue: No functional issues detected. Only minor selector/testid gap on calendar day cells noted above.
